CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CROCKETT, CURRAN ROONEY, ROZLYN BENDA, PENNY CROCKETT, DAVID AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT REGAN, TERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CROCKETT, CURRAN ROONEY, ROZLYN BENDA, PENNY CROCKETT, DAVID RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT REGAN, TERRY $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $372.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
